Satvik Chapati — The Workhorse of Your Kitchen
Satvik Chapati
सात्विक चपाती
Made from 100% whole wheat flour, cold-pressed sunflower oil and Himalayan pink salt — kneaded fresh, rolled uniform, half-baked and blast frozen at –18°C. No maida. No preservatives. No palm oil. No shortcuts.

Place on a hot tawa straight from the freezer. In 60 seconds you have a soft, homestyle chapati your guests won't believe came from a packet. Perfect for weddings, corporate lunches, dabbas, buffets and bulk catering at any scale.
Satvik Puri — 4 Variants · Drop in Oil · Puffs in 5 Seconds
Classic Puri
Golden, uniform, perfectly puffed every time. The reliable crowd-pleaser for pooja lunches, weddings & buffets.
Whole Wheat
Masala Puri
Whole spices blended in — adds flavour without any extra effort. Great with sabzi or as a standalone snack.
Whole SpicesNo Artificial Flavour
Tri-Color Puri
Spinach, Beetroot & Turmeric — naturally coloured, visually stunning. A guaranteed talking point at any event.
SpinachBeetrootTurmericNo Artificial Colours
Aloo Puri
Infused with the warmth of spiced potato flavour — a wholesome, satisfying puri that pairs perfectly with any sabzi or stands alone at snack counters.
Potato FlavouredAll-in-One
Whole Wheat Bhatura
The same Ethical Delights promise — coming to Chole Bhatura. 100% whole wheat, no maida, oval-shaped and par-fried. Drop straight from freezer into hot oil and serve a perfectly puffed, golden bhatura in seconds. No sticky dough, no mess, no skilled labour. Ideal for breakfast menus, snack counters and north Indian catering at scale. Register your interest — early kitchen partners get priority supply.
